concept: each data point is a glass tube that fills with the subject's own photo to its value, side by side
code:
for i in range(n):
    frac = clamp(values[i]/vmax) * reveal
    x = RX0 + 20 + i*300
    w = 220; h = 600; y = 500
    img = images.get(labels[i]) if labels[i] in images else None
    fill_image(img, frac, x, y, w, h, direction='up', color=ACCENT)
    d.rounded_rectangle([x,y,x+w,y+h], outline=rgba(TEXT,255), width=4)
    text(labels[i], x+w/2, y+h+16, size=34, center=True)
    text(str(int(values[i])), x+w/2, y-60, size=48, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)

concept: two subjects face off, each emitting expanding sound rings whose count and reach scale with its decibel value
code:
cy = 600
wimg = images.get(labels[0])
jimg = images.get(labels[1])
for i in range(2):
    v = values[i]
    cxs = RX0 + 240 if i == 0 else RX1 - 240
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    rings = int(clamp(v / vmax) * 6.0 * reveal) + 1
    for k in range(rings):
        rr = 60 + k * 52
        a = int(190.0 * (1.0 - k / (rings + 1.0)) * reveal)
        d.ellipse([cxs - rr, cy - rr, cxs + rr, cy + rr],
                  outline=rgba(col, a), width=6)
img = wimg
for i in range(2):
    img = wimg if i == 0 else jimg
    cxs = RX0 + 240 if i == 0 else RX1 - 240
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 330
        h = int(w / asp)
        if h > 300:
            h = 300
            w = int(h * asp)
        paste(img, cxs - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    na = clamp((reveal - 0.4) / 0.6)
    text(str(int(values[i])) + ' dB', cxs, cy - 330, size=70, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + 210, size=40, center=True)
mid = clamp((reveal - 0.7) / 0.3)
if mid > 0:
    text('1.5x LOUDER', (RX0 + RX1) // 2, 950, size=54, color=WARN, center=True)
topic: Loudest Animals — whale vs jet engine

concept: the single subject sits at the center of sound rings radiating to the frame edges, its value huge at the top
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
cy = 620
img = images.get(labels[0])
rings = int(9.0 * reveal) + 1
for k in range(rings):
    rr = 100 + k * 95
    a = int(170.0 * (1.0 - k / (rings + 2.0)))
    d.ellipse([cx - rr, cy - rr, cx + rr, cy + rr],
              outline=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, a), width=8)
if img is not None:
    asp = img.width / img.height
    w = 660
    h = int(w / asp)
    if h > 500:
        h = 500
        w = int(h * asp)
    paste(img, cx - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
na = clamp((reveal - 0.3) / 0.5)
text(str(int(values[0])) + ' dB', cx, RTOP + 40, size=120,
     color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
text('the loudest animal EVER', cx, cy + 300, size=46, center=True)
text(labels[0], cx, cy + 360, size=40, color=ACCENT, center=True)

concept: two pressure gauges sweep to each contender's PSI, their photos mounted under the dials
code:
for i in range(2):
    v = values[i]
    cxs = RX0 + 250 if i == 0 else RX1 - 250
    cy = 560
    r = 210
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    d.arc([cxs - r, cy - r, cxs + r, cy + r], 150, 390,
          fill=rgba(TEXT, 90), width=16)
    sweep = 150.0 + 240.0 * clamp(v / vmax) * reveal
    d.arc([cxs - r, cy - r, cxs + r, cy + r], 150, int(sweep),
          fill=rgba(col, 255), width=16)
    ang = sweep * math.pi / 180.0
    nx = cxs + int((r - 30) * math.cos(ang))
    ny = cy + int((r - 30) * math.sin(ang))
    d.line([cxs, cy, nx, ny], fill=rgba(col, 255), width=10)
    d.ellipse([cxs - 16, cy - 16, cxs + 16, cy + 16], fill=rgba(col, 255))
    if i == 0:
        img = subject_image('saltwater crocodile open jaws close up')
    else:
        img = subject_image('human man smiling portrait face')
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 310
        h = int(w / asp)
        if h > 220:
            h = 220
            w = int(h * asp)
        paste(img, cxs - w // 2, cy + r + 10, w, h)
    text(str(int(v)) + ' PSI', cxs, cy - r - 100, size=62, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + r + 240, size=38, center=True)
mid = clamp((reveal - 0.7) / 0.3)
if mid > 0:
    text('23x STRONGER', (RX0 + RX1) // 2, RBOT - 80, size=56,
         color=WARN, center=True)
topic: two contenders on sweeping pressure dials

concept: each bird orbits a real Earth image, its arc trail sweeping the exact number of planet-circumferences its annual mileage covers
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
cy = 560
earth = subject_image('planet Earth from space blue marble')
er = 140
if earth is not None:
    paste(earth, cx - er, cy - er, er * 2, er * 2)
circumference = 24901.0
radii = [er + 100, er + 190, er + 280]
cols = [HIGHLIGHT, ACCENT, WARN]
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    revs = v / circumference
    r = radii[i] if i < len(radii) else radii[-1] + (i - 2) * 90
    col = cols[i % len(cols)]
    ang_total = clamp(revs / 2.0) * 720.0 * clamp(reveal)
    start = -90
    end = start + ang_total
    d.arc([cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r], start, end, fill=rgba(col, 230), width=8)
    tip_a = math.radians(end)
    tx = cx + r * math.cos(tip_a)
    ty = cy + r * math.sin(tip_a)
    img = images.get(labels[i])
    if img is not None:
        paste(img, int(tx - 55), int(ty - 55), 110, 110)
    lx = cx + (r + 55) * math.cos(math.radians(start + 8))
    ly = cy + (r + 55) * math.sin(math.radians(start + 8))
    text(labels[i] + " " + str(round(revs, 1)) + "x", int(lx), int(ly), size=28, color=col)
text('LAPS AROUND EARTH EACH YEAR', cx, RTOP + 10, size=38, center=True)

concept: birds stoop down a vertical mph ruler leaving a motion-blur streak, diving further the faster their real top speed
code:
ruler_x = RX1 - 90
d.line([ruler_x, RTOP + 40, ruler_x, RBOT - 40], fill=rgba(TEXT, 160), width=6)
top_v = 260.0
for tick in range(0, 261, 50):
    ty = RTOP + 40 + (RBOT - 40 - RTOP - 40) * (1 - tick / top_v)
    d.line([ruler_x - 14, ty, ruler_x + 14, ty], fill=rgba(TEXT, 160), width=4)
    text(str(tick), ruler_x + 24, ty - 16, size=24, color=TEXT)
lane_w = (RX1 - RX0 - 200) / max(1, n)
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    frac = clamp(v / top_v)
    cx = RX0 + 40 + lane_w * (i + 0.5)
    y_end = RTOP + 40 + (RBOT - 80) * (1 - frac) * clamp(reveal / 0.85)
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    for k in range(8):
        a = int(140 * (1 - k / 8.0) * clamp(reveal))
        yy = RTOP + (y_end - RTOP) * (1 - k / 9.0)
        d.line([cx, RTOP + 40, cx, yy], fill=rgba(col, a), width=10)
    img = images.get(labels[i])
    if img is not None:
        paste(img, int(cx - 65), int(y_end - 65), 130, 130)
    text(str(int(v)) + " MPH", int(cx), int(y_end + 76), size=30, center=True, color=col)
    text(labels[i], int(cx), int(y_end + 112), size=22, center=True)
text('STOOP SPEED', RX0 + 10, RTOP, size=38, color=TEXT)

concept: birds perch at their real recorded altitude on a ladder rising off a real Everest peak image, so their height IS the comparison
code:
mtn = subject_image('Mount Everest snowy peak')
if mtn is not None:
    mw = RX1 - RX0
    mh = int(mw * 0.5)
    paste(mtn, RX0, RBOT - mh, mw, mh)
top_v = 30000.0
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    frac = clamp(v / top_v) * clamp(reveal)
    y = RBOT - (RBOT - RTOP - 60) * frac
    x = RX0 + 150 + i * 320
    d.line([x, RBOT, x, y], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 150), width=4)
    img = images.get(labels[i])
    if img is not None:
        paste(img, int(x - 65), int(y - 65), 130, 130)
    text(str(int(v)) + " ft", int(x), int(y - 92), size=30, center=True, color=HIGHLIGHT)
    text(labels[i], int(x), int(y + 78), size=22, center=True)
text('EVEREST = 29,029 FT', (RX0 + RX1) // 2, RTOP + 10, size=32, center=True, color=WARN)

concept: each bird's endurance bar fills with alternating day/night stripes counted out to its real nonstop hours, the bird riding the leading edge
code:
lane_h = 120
top = RTOP + 70
maxv = 48.0
bar_w = RX1 - RX0 - 260
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    y = top + i * (lane_h + 50)
    x0 = RX0 + 220
    full_w = bar_w * clamp(v / maxv)
    w = full_w * clamp(reveal)
    stripe = 34
    steps = int(w / stripe) + 1
    for s in range(steps):
        sx = x0 + s * stripe
        if sx > x0 + w:
            break
        is_day = (s % 2) == 0
        col = (255, 200, 90) if is_day else (35, 45, 80)
        d.rectangle([sx, y, min(sx + stripe, x0 + w), y + lane_h], fill=rgba(col, 230))
    d.rounded_rectangle([x0, y, x0 + full_w, y + lane_h], radius=16, outline=rgba(TEXT, 220), width=4)
    img = images.get(labels[i])
    if img is not None and w > 40:
        paste(img, int(x0 + w - 70), int(y + lane_h / 2 - 70), 140, 140)
    text(labels[i], x0, y - 34, size=28, color=TEXT)
    text(str(int(v)) + "h nonstop", x0 - 10, y + lane_h + 10, size=26, color=HIGHLIGHT)
text('NO LANDING. NO REST.', (RX0 + RX1) // 2, RTOP, size=38, center=True, color=WARN)

concept: each bird's real yearly mileage unrolls as a ticked ruler with the bird riding the leading tick, ticks every 5,000 miles
code:
maxv = 44000.0
lane_h = 150
top = RTOP + 40
bar_w = RX1 - RX0 - 260
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    y = top + i * (lane_h + 30)
    x0 = RX0 + 200
    full_w = bar_w * clamp(v / maxv)
    w = full_w * clamp(reveal)
    d.rounded_rectangle([x0, y, x0 + full_w, y + 14], radius=6, outline=rgba(TEXT, 120), width=2)
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    d.rounded_rectangle([x0, y, x0 + w, y + 14], radius=6, fill=rgba(col, 255))
    ticks = int(v / 5000)
    for t in range(1, ticks + 1):
        tx = x0 + bar_w * (t * 5000.0 / maxv)
        if tx > x0 + w:
            break
        d.line([tx, y - 10, tx, y + 24], fill=rgba(TEXT, 200), width=3)
    img = images.get(labels[i])
    if img is not None and w > 40:
        paste(img, int(x0 + w - 60), int(y - 55), 120, 120)
    text(labels[i], x0, y - 34, size=26, color=TEXT)
    text(str(int(v)) + " mi/yr", x0, y + 30, size=28, color=HIGHLIGHT)
text('MEASURED IN MILES FLOWN', (RX0 + RX1) // 2, RTOP, size=34, center=True)

concept: three speedometer dials sweep live to each contender's real top speed, its photo mounted at the dial's center
code:
cy = 620
r = 190
cols = [HIGHLIGHT, ACCENT, WARN]
topv = 260.0
gap = (RX1 - RX0) / max(1, n)
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    cx = RX0 + gap * (i + 0.5)
    col = cols[i % len(cols)]
    d.arc([cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r], 160, 380, fill=rgba(TEXT, 90), width=14)
    sweep = 160.0 + 220.0 * clamp(v / topv) * clamp(reveal)
    d.arc([cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r], 160, sweep, fill=rgba(col, 255), width=14)
    ang = math.radians(sweep)
    nx = cx + (r - 30) * math.cos(ang)
    ny = cy + (r - 30) * math.sin(ang)
    d.line([cx, cy, nx, ny], fill=rgba(col, 255), width=8)
    img = images.get(labels[i])
    if img is not None:
        paste(img, int(cx - 70), int(cy - 70), 140, 140)
    text(str(int(v)) + " MPH", int(cx), int(cy + r + 20), size=28, center=True, color=col)
    text(labels[i], int(cx), int(cy + r + 58), size=22, center=True)

concept: a real calendar grid holds two markers, an old arrival date and today's, with today's marker dragged the real number of days earlier as a subject lands on it
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
top = RTOP + 70
cal_w = RX1 - RX0 - 80
cal_h = 260
x0 = RX0 + 40
d.rounded_rectangle([x0, top, x0 + cal_w, top + cal_h], radius=24, outline=rgba(TEXT, 200), width=4)
days = 30
cell_w = cal_w / days
for day in range(days):
    dx = x0 + day * cell_w
    d.line([dx, top, dx, top + cal_h], fill=rgba(TEXT, 60), width=2)
shift = values[1] if n > 1 else values[0]
old_x = x0 + cal_w * 0.72
new_x = old_x - cell_w * shift * clamp(reveal)
d.line([old_x, top - 20, old_x, top + cal_h + 20], fill=rgba(WARN, 200), width=6)
text('1960s ARRIVAL', int(old_x), top - 58, size=24, center=True, color=WARN)
d.line([new_x, top - 20, new_x, top + cal_h + 20], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 255), width=6)
text('TODAY', int(new_x), top - 58, size=24, center=True, color=HIGHLIGHT)
img = subject_image('small songbird perched on branch')
if img is not None:
    paste(img, int(new_x - 70), top + cal_h - 60, 140, 140)
text(str(int(shift)) + " DAYS EARLIER", cx, top + cal_h + 80, size=42, center=True, color=WARN)

concept: a compass-dial pie splits into real-icon wedges sized to each cue's true share, a subject silhouette at the hub
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
cy = 620
r = 260
start = -90.0
total = sum(values) or 1.0
cols = [HIGHLIGHT, ACCENT, WARN]
icons = ['magnet bar icon', 'bright sun icon', 'flower scent icon']
for i in range(n):
    frac = values[i] / total
    sweep = 360.0 * frac * clamp(reveal)
    end = start + sweep
    col = cols[i % len(cols)]
    d.pieslice([cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r], start, end, fill=rgba(col, 200))
    mid = math.radians((start + end) / 2.0)
    ix = cx + (r * 0.62) * math.cos(mid)
    iy = cy + (r * 0.62) * math.sin(mid)
    icon = subject_image(icons[i]) if i < len(icons) else None
    if icon is not None:
        paste(icon, int(ix - 45), int(iy - 45), 90, 90)
    lx = cx + (r + 70) * math.cos(mid)
    ly = cy + (r + 70) * math.sin(mid)
    text(str(int(values[i])) + "%", int(lx), int(ly - 14), size=32, center=True, color=col)
    text(labels[i], int(lx), int(ly + 22), size=20, center=True)
    start = end
bird = subject_image('small songbird flying silhouette')
if bird is not None:
    paste(bird, int(cx - 60), int(cy - 60), 120, 120)
